---
title:
  The Choice of Normalization Influences Shrinkage in Regularized Regression
author: Johan Larsson
description: >
  A talk for TMLR on our paper about how feature normalization affects
  shrinkage and selection in regularized regression (lasso, ridge, elastic net).
abstract: |
date: 2025-11-17
image: image.png
slides: https://github.com/jolars/normreg/raw/main/talks/tmlr/main.pdf
arxiv: "2501.03821"
citation:
  type: speech
  issued: 2025-11-17
  genre: Online
  event-title: TMLR 2025
  event-place: Online
  url: https://www.youtube.com/GYqYAy3-B1k
---

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/GYqYAy3-B1k >}}
